definitions: A female given name, a French form of Margaret.
A type of daisy, especially the common daisy (Bellis perennis) or the oxeye daisy (Leucanthemum vulgare).
A cocktail made with tequila, lime juice, and an orange-flavored liqueur, often served with salt on the rim of the glass.
examples: Marguerite was known for her beautiful garden.
The field was full of marguerites.
He ordered a Marguerite at the bar.
